---
title: "25 Jun 2026: Currently working"
author: "Eve Ansell"
date: "2026-06-25 10:32"
categories: [week_notes]
---

Quotes from ResBaz QLD

"Do 414 of these text files contain the first line of Waltzing Matilda?" - Betsy

"This corpus might contain a book about camel care. It probably doesn't though." - Sam

"I wish I'd chosen a smaller example dataset." - Sam

"I think we might need more chairs..." - Eve

"We need more chairs!" - Eve

"I wrote down 'introduce self' so this is going well already." - Sam

"We have created an award called the 'Hames Award' for the most workshops at ResBaz. Here is your prize t-shirt!" - Maca
